def solve(nums, k)
  n = nums.length
  nums.sort!
  max_len = 1
  for i in 0...n

    low = i
    high = n - 1
    best = i - 1

        high = mid - 1
      end

    max_len = [max_len, current_len].max
  end
  return n - max_len
end

def solve(nums, k)
    nums.sort!
    n = nums.length
    max_len = 1
    for i in 0...n do

        low = i

        max_len = [max_len, current_len].max
    end
    return n - max_len
end
